_comment: ALC Student Text Book 4 (1991ALCST04): PDF → Markdown. Paths relative to this file.
splitInstructions:
- This is an American Language Course (ALC) Student Text book.
- Split at top-level boundaries: each new LESSON / UNIT (e.g. "LESSON 4A") is its own split. Treat a prominent lesson/unit title page or heading as the split point.
- Do NOT split for minor sections like Vocabulary, Exercises, or individual dialogs unless the book treats them as top-level.
